cases.name: complex_sql_tool
cases.detail: answer terms ok; completed; required tools ok; arguments: sql terms ok; efficiency: tool calls efficient; hygiene: clean final answer

arguments.sql:
SELECT product, 
       SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue, 
       SUM(cost) AS total_cost,
       ROUND((SUM(revenue) - SUM(cost)) / SUM(revenue) * 100, 2) AS gross_margin_pct
FROM sales
GROUP BY product
ORDER BY gross_margin_pct DESC
LIMIT 1;

cases.output: **Gadget** has the highest gross margin at **95%** (compared to Widget's 70%).
